title: verbascum pinetorum
intro: Verbascum pinetorum, also known as Pine Mulein or Mulein, is a biennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, characterized by its tall stems and clusters of white or yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Verbascum pinetorum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and improve sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Verbascum pinetorum typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or salves for topical application.
